author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Perceptum - Announcement trailer
Perceptum is a psychological horror game where you play as a medium investigating the disappearance of a family. Explore a house with an oppressive atmosphere, close your eyes to hear the beyond, use your mirror to see what should not exist and uncover the truth hidden within its walls.

Coming to XBOX Series X|S in 2027!

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Season 2 Cinematic Trailer | Marathon
Darkness descends on Tau Ceti IV. Season 2 begins June 2. 

Featuring a new map with Night Marsh, a new Runner shell Sentinel, the Cradle, new weapons, progression improvements, and more.

Play Now: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/marathon/9pb32dkqkzdq

Explore the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV, scavenging valuable loot in a high-stakes survival first person shooter from the creators of Halo and Destiny. Infiltrate the dark sci-fi world of Marathon filled with rival players, enemy forces, and unpredictable dangers. Scavenge its maps alone or with a crew, then fight your way to extraction in tense, high-stakes PVP and PVE battles.
